headline: Should Fortinet’s New TD SYNNEX Partnership and AI Endpoint Upgrades Require Action From Fortinet (FTNT) Investors?
summary: Earlier this week, TD SYNNEX announced it had been named one of Fortinet’s approved global distributors, while Fortinet also unveiled upcoming FortiEndpoint enhancements that add AI governance, native data loss prevention, and FortiAI-assisted operations, expected to be available in the third quarter of 2026. Together, the broadened TD SYNNEX channel role and AI-focused FortiEndpoint upgrades highlight how Fortinet is pairing distribution scale with richer AI security capabilities to support...
